/usr/bin/c++  -std=gnu++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/heimdall-frontend_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/source/aboutform.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/source/Alerts.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/source/FirmwareInfo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/source/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/source/mainwindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/source/PackageData.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/source/Packaging.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/heimdall-frontend.dir/qrc_mainwindow.cpp.o" -o ../bin/heimdall-frontend.app/Contents/MacOS/heimdall-frontend -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  ../libpit/libpit.a /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets -lz /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
